title: Co-founder, Writer
bio: Writes long-form essays on tactics, club culture, and the things the box score misses.
longBio:
Author One started watching soccer properly the year he realized a 0-0 could be the best game of the weekend. He writes about tactics, club culture, and the spaces between the numbers.

When not watching matches, he is usually re-watching them. Favorite things on a pitch: an inverted fullback who knows when not to invert, a winger who will thanklessly track back, a set-piece routine you can tell was practiced on a Tuesday.

Replace this bio with your own in content/authors.json.

title: Co-founder, Analyst
bio: Builds analytical projects and notebooks. Prefers a well-labeled chart to a hot take.
longBio:
Author Two runs the numbers here. Expected goals, pass networks, pressing triggers, the occasional regression when the mood strikes. He is suspicious of any stat that can't be drawn on a napkin.

His notebooks live on this site in full. Nothing ever goes behind a paywall.

Replace this bio with your own in content/authors.json.
